parameters.name: langCode
parameters.description: Optional language code for filtering articles by language. If not provided, uses the project version's default language.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (zero-based, default: 0). Used for pagination when hitsPerPage > 0.

parameters.name: hitsPerPage
parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 0 = return all articles, max: 100). When > 0, enables pagination.

parameters.name: securityVisibility
parameters.description: Optional protection level filter: 0 = Public, 1 = Protected. If null, returns all articles regardless of protection level.
